full_description: FocusForge is a productivity app designed to help users stay focused and avoid distractions. It provides a suite of tools to boost concentration and efficiency, allowing you to prioritize tasks, manage time, and achieve your goals. With FocusForge, you can create customized productivity plans, set reminders, and track progress. The app also includes features such as website blockers, phone usage tracking, and personalized focus-enhancing recommendations. Whether you're a student, professional, or entrepreneur, FocusForge helps you stay on track and make the most of your time.
